a.xlink:title: Updates which card is currently hovered based on scene coordinates.
Converts a CardRef into an ExactCard.
Creates a new instance with only the card name.
Emitted when a pixmap for this card has been updated or finished loading.
Returns the CardDatabaseQuerier of the singleton database.
Deactivates hover state and restores the card to its clip container.
Called when a card is added to this zone. Default: reparents card to this item. Virtual so subclasses...
